You are about to sign: Release 100 ACME from escrow to acc://bob.acme on Kermit.
It acts as acc://alice.acme using key page acc://alice.acme/book/1 (version 1).
It MOVES funds/credits (out: 100 ACME).
An AI agent initiated this request.
Expected proof: L4 proof anchored to Kermit.
Irreversible effects: writes a real transaction to Kermit (cannot be un-written); moves value — once anchored it cannot be reversed.
